questions.context_sentence: Match the school subjects in the box with the pictures: art, biology, Chinese, IT, English, geography, history, maths, music, PE.
questions.cn: 将方框中的学科与图片匹配：美术、生物、语文、信息技术、英语、地理、历史、数学、音乐、体育。
questions.hint: bio (生命) + logy (学科)，研究生命的学科。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Peter has IT and PE today.
questions.cn: 彼得今天有信息技术课和体育课。
questions.hint: I (信息) + T (技术)，两个字母缩写。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I have art and geography.
questions.cn: 我有美术课和地理课。
questions.hint: geo (地球) + graphy (描写)，描写地球的学科。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I have history on Tuesday mornings.
questions.cn: 我周二早上有历史课。
questions.hint: his (他的) + tory (故事)，他的故事就是历史。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: adj. 乏味的; 令人生厌的
questions.context_sentence: Because maths is boring to me.
questions.cn: 因为数学对我来说很乏味。
questions.hint: bore (令人厌烦) + ing，形容事物令人无聊。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: adj. 有用的; 有益的
questions.context_sentence: It's useful, and my English teacher is really nice.
questions.cn: 它很有用，而且我的英语老师人非常好。
questions.hint: use (使用) + ful (充满)，充满用处的。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: adj. 令人激动的; 使人兴奋的
questions.context_sentence: PE, because it's exciting.
questions.cn: 体育，因为它令人激动。
questions.hint: excite (使兴奋) + ing，形容事物令人兴奋。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: adj. 令人激动的; 使人兴奋的

questions.meaning: n. 过去; 过去的事情
questions.context_sentence: It's interesting to learn about the past.
questions.cn: 了解过去很有趣。
questions.hint: pass (经过) + t，经过的事情就是过去。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It's interesting to learn about the ____.

questions.context_sentence: Because I'm good with numbers.
questions.cn: 因为我很擅长处理数字。
questions.hint: num (数) + ber，数字。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Favourite subject, Reason.
questions.cn: 最喜欢的科目，原因。
questions.hint: rea (读作'理') + son (儿子)，理由之子。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Sometimes it's difficult to remember all the information.
questions.cn: 有时很难记住所有的信息。
questions.hint: re (再) + member (成员)，再次想起成员=记住。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Sometimes it's difficult to ____ all the information.

questions.meaning: adj. 优秀的; 极好的
questions.context_sentence: My music teacher is excellent.
questions.cn: 我的音乐老师非常优秀。
questions.hint: excel (优秀) + lent，特别优秀的。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: n. 乐器; 器械; 工具
questions.context_sentence: He lets us play all kinds of interesting instruments.
questions.cn: 他让我们演奏各种有趣的乐器。
questions.hint: in + stru (结构) + ment，有结构的工具/乐器。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: n. 乐器; 器械; 工具

questions.context_sentence: I want to be a singer in the future.
questions.cn: 我将来想成为一名歌手。
questions.hint: sing (唱歌) + er (人)，唱歌的人。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I want to be a ____ in the future.

questions.context_sentence: I want to be a singer in the future.
questions.cn: 我将来想成为一名歌手。
questions.hint: fu (赴) + ture，赴往未来。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: This term, I have subjects like Chinese, history...
questions.cn: 这学期，我有语文、历史等科目……
questions.hint: ter (学) + m，一段学期。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: We learn how to work out maths problems in class.
questions.cn: 我们在课堂上学习如何解决数学问题。
questions.hint: work (工作) + out (出)，算出结果。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We learn how to ____ maths problems in class.

questions.context_sentence: We learn how to work out maths problems in class.
questions.cn: 我们在课堂上学习如何解决数学问题。
questions.hint: pro (专业) + blem，专业难题。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: It feels like magic and is really fun.
questions.cn: 感觉像魔法一样，真的很有趣。
questions.hint: mag (大的) + ic，大力量 = 魔法。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Maths is very useful in our life.
questions.cn: 数学在我们的生活中非常有用。
questions.hint: l + ife，生活和生命。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Maths is very useful in our ____.

questions.context_sentence: I want to be a scientist in the future.
questions.cn: 我将来想成为一名科学家。
questions.hint: science (科学) + tist (人)，搞科学的人。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Oh, it's difficult for me.
questions.cn: 哦，对我来说太难了。
questions.hint: diffi (困) + cult (难)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: adj. 有趣的; 令人感兴趣的
questions.context_sentence: It's interesting to learn about the past.
questions.cn: 了解过去很有趣。
questions.hint: interest (兴趣) + ing，令人感兴趣的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It's ____ to learn about the past.

questions.context_sentence: What's your favourite subject?
questions.cn: 你最喜欢的科目是什么？
questions.hint: fav (宠爱) + ourite，最宠爱的。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: What's your favourite subject?
questions.cn: 你最喜欢的科目是什么？
questions.hint: sub (在下面) + ject (投射)，被投射的主题/学科。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I like Chinese because it's fun.
questions.cn: 我喜欢语文，因为它很有趣。
questions.hint: be (是) + cause (原因)，是因为。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I'm very busy this year.
questions.cn: 我今年非常忙。
questions.hint: bus (公交) + y，公交一样忙碌。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: We learn a lot of new songs.
questions.cn: 我们学习了很多新歌。
questions.hint: s + ong，用 sing 唱出 song。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: No, it's hard for me.
questions.cn: 不，对我来说很难。
questions.hint: h + ard，硬的和困难的。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Because it's fun.
questions.cn: 因为它很有趣。
questions.hint: f + un，有趣的事情。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: My favourite subject is Chinese.
questions.cn: 我最喜欢的科目是语文。
questions.hint: China (中国) + ese。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I'm good with numbers in maths class.
questions.cn: 我在数学课上很擅长处理数字。
questions.hint: mathematics 的缩写。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I'm good with numbers in ____ class.

questions.context_sentence: My English teacher is really nice.
questions.cn: 我的英语老师人非常好。
questions.hint: England 的语言。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I have art and geography today.
questions.cn: 我今天有美术课和地理课。
questions.hint: 画画的艺术。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Music always makes me happy.
questions.cn: 音乐总是让我快乐。
questions.hint: muse (缪斯) 带来的灵感。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: PE, because it's exciting.
questions.cn: 体育，因为它令人激动。
questions.hint: Physical Education 的缩写。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I study French this term.
questions.cn: 这学期我学习法语。
questions.hint: France (法国) 的形容词形式。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: She likes to listen to music.
questions.cn: 她喜欢听音乐。
questions.hint: listen (听) + to (向)，仔细地听。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: He is good at English.
questions.cn: 他擅长英语。
questions.hint: good (好) + at (在)，在某方面好。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Can you help me with this subject?
questions.cn: 你能帮我学习这门功课吗？
questions.hint: help (帮助) + with (在...方面)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: 拉丁语 ante meridiem (中午前)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Class (PM): 5, 6, 7.
questions.hint: 拉丁语 post meridiem (中午后)。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Who likes the same subjects as you?
questions.cn: 谁喜欢和你一样的科目？
questions.hint: as 很短但意思多：作为、像、当...时。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: But every subject is important.
questions.cn: 但是每个科目都很重要。
questions.hint: im + port (港口) + ant，进入港口的东西很重要。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: adj. 有用的; 有益的
questions.context_sentence: Maths is very useful in our life.
questions.cn: 数学在我们的生活中非常有用。
questions.hint: use (使用) + ful (充满)，充满用处的。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: adj. 令人激动的; 使人兴奋的
questions.context_sentence: PE, because it's exciting.
questions.cn: 体育，因为它令人激动。
questions.hint: excite (使兴奋) + ing，形容事物令人兴奋。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: adj. 令人激动的; 使人兴奋的

questions.meaning: adj. 乏味的; 令人生厌的
questions.context_sentence: Because maths is boring to me.
questions.cn: 因为数学对我来说很乏味。
questions.hint: bore (令人厌烦) + ing，形容事物令人无聊。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: It's biology class, and it's exciting!
questions.cn: 那是生物课，非常令人兴奋！
questions.hint: bio (生命) + logy (学科)，研究生命的学科。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: It's interesting to learn about the past in history class.
questions.cn: 在历史课上了解过去很有趣。
questions.hint: his (他的) + tory (故事)，他的故事就是历史。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: n. 过去; 过去的事情
questions.context_sentence: It's interesting to learn about the past.
questions.cn: 了解过去很有趣。
questions.hint: pass (经过) + t，经过的事情就是过去。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It's interesting to learn about the ____.
